Onboarding

2-week rolling windows · up to 5 accounts each

Maintenance

What CAL does for you every month

You're all set up 🎉

Your onboarding is complete. Here's the ongoing work our team does behind the scenes to keep your marketing growing month after month.

Monthly OptimizationONGOING

We fine-tune your Google & Meta Ads every month — adjusting budgets, targeting, and creative to lower your cost per lead and get more out of every dollar.

ReportingMONTHLY

You get a clear, plain-English report every month showing leads, spend, and revenue generated — so you always know exactly what your marketing is doing.

Review Generation & ResponsesONGOING

We help you collect new 5-star reviews from happy customers and respond to every review that comes in — building trust and improving your local ranking.

Monthly Strategy Check-inMONTHLY

A quick call to review your results together, answer your questions, and set the priorities for the month ahead — so we're always moving toward your goals.

    Help & Support

    Get answers and reach your team

    Frequently Asked
    Your ROI report is updated monthly. Go to Reports → View Latest. It shows total spend, revenue attributed, cost per lead, and ROAS by channel.
    Leads from Google Ads and Meta are pulled in real-time via webhook. You'll receive a push notification and email for each new lead within seconds.
    Yes. All content goes through an approval flow in Content AI. You can approve, request changes, or reject any piece before it's published.
    The CAL Health Score (0–100) measures how well all your marketing channels are performing collectively. 70+ is good, 85+ is excellent.
    Go to Billing → Change Plan. Changes take effect immediately and are prorated for the current billing cycle.
    Contact Support

    Direct Contact

    📧 info@cal.marketing
    📞 (305) 555-CALL
    💬 Live chat M–F, 9AM–6PM ET

    Connect your training platform to sync courses and track rep progress.

    Sarah Martinez — 3 lost deals on pricing this week
    Training Modules4 active

    Module 1: Discovery Call Framework

    Learn how to uncover client pain points and qualify leads in under 10 minutes.

    Complete · All 3 reps

    Module 2: Objection Handling

    Scripts and frameworks for the 8 most common objections in legal services sales.

    2/3 reps complete

    Module 3: Price Objections

    Turn price sensitivity into value conversations. Includes live call examples.

    1/3 reps complete — John needs this

    Module 4: Closing Frameworks

    The assumptive close, urgency close, and recap close — when and how to use each.

    Notes

    Private workspace for thoughts and research

    Q3 Strategy Notes

    Ideas for scaling Google Ads budget and launching new campaigns...

    Jun 18, 2026 · 2 min read

    Apex Legal — Client Brief

    Personal injury focus. Main KPIs are lead volume and ROAS...

    Jun 15, 2026 · 4 min read

    SEO Research — Keywords

    Long-tail keywords for personal injury content cluster...

    Jun 10, 2026 · 6 min read

    Q3 Strategy Planning

    Key areas to address for Q3:

    • Scale Google Ads budget from $2,100 to $3,500/month
    • Launch Meta Lookalike audience targeting personal injury
    • Add display remarketing campaign targeting legal research queries
    • Increase review volume to 20+/month via NFC card distribution

    Content ideas: Case win video series, FAQ blog post cluster, client testimonial compilation.

    0 of 7 connected
    Connect Your Social Platforms

    Your social platforms are managed and connected by your CAL Marketing account manager. Reach out to get Google Business, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, or X connected to your portal.

    Contact Your Account Manager →

    Why connect your platforms?

    When you connect a platform, CAL can post on your behalf, schedule content in advance, respond to reviews and comments, pull engagement analytics directly into your reports, and show you exactly how social media is impacting your lead flow. Contact your account manager to get any platform connected.

          Admin

          Full dashboard access — analytics, content approval, billing, team management.

          Staff (User)

          Limited access — to-dos, notes, shared files, and inbox only.

          Edit Member

          SELECT ROLE

          Agency Admin

          Full access to all client accounts, billing, subscriptions, and team management.

          Agency Member

          Access to assigned client accounts and day-to-day work — no billing or team controls.

          This admin will get full dashboard access for the selected client account.

          CAL AI
          👋 Hi! I'm CAL AI. Ask me anything about your campaigns, leads, or performance.

          Sign in with Google

          How are we doing?

          Your feedback helps us serve you better. This takes less than a minute.

          1. Overall, how satisfied are you with CAL Marketing?

          2. How would you rate the results we've delivered so far?

          3. How would you rate our communication and responsiveness?

          4. Is there anything specific you'd like us to improve? (optional)

          5. Would you refer CAL Marketing to another business?

          Please answer all required questions before submitting.

          Video Testimonial 🎥

          Share a 30–60 second clip about your experience. It'll be saved directly to your account files under Client Testimonials.

          With your permission, your testimonial may be used on our website or marketing materials.
